info.title: NX Torrent Player
info.author: shodowlo
info.description: Stremio and  torrent on Nintendo Switch
info.details:
A homebrew video player with a BitTorrent engine built in. Streams local torrent files or integrates directly with your Stremio account to stream movies and TV shows without waiting for full downloads.

Features:

Torrent Streaming: Downloads pieces sequentially so playback starts in seconds. Automatically re-centers ahead of the playhead when seeking.

Stremio Integration: Sign in to sync your library, browse seasons/episodes, and stream directly from your configured addons.

Local Playback: Drop .torrent files directly into /switch/NX-torrent-player/torrents/.

Borealis UI: Horizon-styled interface optimized for controllers and touch controls.

Auto-Updates: Built-in updater keeps the app up to date from inside the UI.

changelog:
v0.1.1

Stream pieces directly from RAM to eliminate per-piece playback stutter.

Updated CMake build configuration and project versioning.
